subcodes.first_line: O friends of God and His party! Hearken unto the voice of Him Who is wronged. In truth I say, the people of the Bayán today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله و حزبه ندای مظلوم را بشنوید براستی میگویم اهل بیان الیوم از
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
